Operations Banquet Menus Logistics Log Mooncake

Tang Huot Bakery

Traditional Pastries Wholesale
Reliable High-Volume Supply

Tang Huot Bakery supplies egg yolk pies, mooncakes, and Fa Gao for wholesale and festive seasons. Operating from our new facility, we focus on maintaining hygiene and a consistent, pleasant taste for all our partners.

Wholesale & Orders
Classic Pastry

Tang Huot Egg Yolk Pie: A Traditional Taste

The egg yolk pie is a pastry we make with care. Even during large production runs, we carefully monitor the baking process to ensure the crust remains flaky and the center stays soft and flavorful.

Festive Mooncakes: Baked with Care

Making mooncakes in large quantities requires careful attention. We use large ovens and monitor temperatures closely to ensure an even bake. We strive to keep the fillings moist and tender for the festive season.

Fa Gao: Prepared for the Lunar New Year

During the Lunar New Year, we are fully prepared to supply our wholesale partners with a steady quantity of Fa Gao.

A good Fa Gao requires the right batter and careful steaming. We watch the heat closely to ensure each cake blooms properly, making them a suitable offering for the new year.
